status_note: 5 of 6 ACs PASS. AC2 BLOCKED: raw.githubusercontent.com returns 404 because repo is private. NTS decision required between (A) make repo public, or (B) route Lane_03 through authenticated GitHub API (T-RUNTIME-003). See REPORT §11.

AC1.description: runtime/current_state.md exists trên main branch, GitHub UI accessible

evidence.note: Blob URL loads for authenticated viewers; repo is private.

AC2.description: Raw URL trả 200 OK với content trên
AC2.root_cause: Repository is private (gh api repos/unitonzengarden/Uniton_Shared --jq .private => true). raw.githubusercontent.com does not serve content from private repos without auth — by GitHub design, not a propagation lag. Verified by polling 30 times over 90s at both main-pinned and commit-pinned (798b87a) URL forms; both 404.
AC2.authenticated_alternative_works: gh api repos/unitonzengarden/Uniton_Shared/contents/runtime/current_state.md?ref=main returns full 4221-byte file correctly.
resolution_paths: A — NTS makes repo public; AC2 immediately passes; trade-off is irreversible historical exposure of all repo content.
B — Keep repo private; T-RUNTIME-003 (Custom GPT Action) provides authenticated API access for Lane_03; follow-up T-RUNTIME-001-FIX updates AC2 wording and §9 RAW URL in current_state.md.
AC2.lane_01_recommendation: Path B — preserves historical privacy; T-RUNTIME-003 work is already queued; PAT scope can be narrowed.

AC4.description: reports/T-RUNTIME-001_REPORT.md exists, chứa commit hash + raw URL

AC5.correction_commit_note: This snapshot was edited in a follow-up correction commit, also carrying [vercel skip].

AC6.description: No secrets in file (no PAT, no .env, no credentials)
AC6.verification: grep scan against ghp_/github_pat_/PRIVATE KEY/AWS/secret patterns

qa_gate_law_27.blocked_until: NTS resolves AC2 visibility decision (Path A or Path B) — see REPORT §11

test_2.name: Cold-start ChatGPT thread can read raw URL and summarize
test_2.blocker_reason: URL returns 404 because repo is private; cold-start ChatGPT cannot fetch. Will become executable after Path A or Path B resolution.
